CREATE TABLE http_map_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, vdir VARCHAR(255), path VARCHAR(255), host VARCHAR(255), virtual_host VARCHAR(255));
http_map_table ('/dir1', '/dir1/', 'www.test.com', 'host.test.com', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'HTTP', 'DIR1_APP', 'test_auth_hook', 'test_post_processor', NULL, 'test_user', 0, vector('Key', 'Value'));

http_map_table ('/api', '/api/', 'www.api.com', 'host.api.com', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'SSL', 'API_APP', 'api_auth_hook', 'api_post_processor', NULL, 'api_user', 1, vector('Namespace', 'http://example.com/api/v1/', 'ServiceName', 'apiService'));
http_map_table ('/nested', (SELECT CONCAT('/nested/', id) FROM another_table WHERE condition = TRUE LIMIT 1), 'www.nested.com', 'host.nested.com');

http_map_table ('/join', '/join/', (SELECT h.host_name FROM host_table h JOIN domain_table d ON h.id = d.host_id WHERE d.domain = 'join.com'), 'host.join.com', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'HTTP', 'JOIN_APP', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'join_user', 1, vector('Key', 'Value'));
http_map_table (SELECT vdir FROM vdir_table WHERE is_active=TRUE LIMIT 1, '/path/', 'www.another.com', 'host.another.com');

http_map_table ('/testdir', '/test/', (SELECT host FROM host_table LIMIT 1), (SELECT virtual_host FROM virtual_host_table LIMIT 1), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'HTTP', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0, vector());
http_map_table ('/fuzz', '/fuzz/', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'SSL', 'FUZZ_APP', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 1, vector('FuzzTest', 'true'));
http_map_table ('/edge_case', REPEAT('/edge/', 20), 'www.edge.com', 'host.edge.com', NULL, NULL, NULL, 'HTTP', 'EDGE_APP', 'edge_auth_hook', 'edge_post_processor', NULL, 'edge_user', 1, vector());
